summary: Portability audit Gap 1: init now additively renders non-Claude identity shadows (AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md) from canonical .instar/AGENT.md via new renderNonClaudeIdentityShadows helper. claude-code excluded (rich CLAUDE.md owns that filename — Gap 6 covers unification). Best-effort, idempotent, no-op-no-throw without canonical source. 5-case unit test. Ships v1.0.9, first of the v1.0.9-v1.0.14 hardening series committed to in the v1.0.8 notes.
